heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 70511 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7051136:581., .Aug. 24, 1954, ch. 911, § 1168 Stat. 799
